results.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong homers and has 4 hits in the Cubs' 6-1 win over the Cardinals
results.description: Pete Crow-Armstrong had four hits including a homer, Ben Brown allowed three hits in seven innings and the Chicago Cubs beat the St. Louis Cardinals 6-1 on Saturday night.

results.title: Breese Central ends Father McGivney's regional title streak
results.description: A fourth consecutive regional title slipped away after missed chances and a six-run deficit proved too much to overcome.
